verdicts.title: Offline outbox dedup keys on (method, url) only — collapses ALL offline edits of one resource type to a single row; the rest are silently lost
verdicts.reasoning: Verified inline: api.ts:548 upsertExpense POSTs to the constant collection URL /api/expenses (id in body), api.ts:620 days→/api/days, misc.ts:91 settlements→/api/settlements; outbox.ts:205-218 dedups on (method,url) and REPLACES the prior body, so two distinct offline creates collapse to the last one.

verdicts.title: Offline batch CSV/Tricount/Splitwise import: entire import collapses to ONE expense in the outbox
verdicts.reasoning: Same root as the dedup bug: a bulk import fires N upsertExpense calls all to POST /api/expenses; offline they enqueue to one (method,url) key and collapse to a single row. No navigator.onLine guard on the import path.

verdicts.title: Offline media deletes (to-do place removal, 'Clear all', photo/document delete) are silently undone — union-merge can only ADD items back, never remove
verdicts.reasoning: Consistent with media.ts: _mergeMediaField is add-only (out=[...server] then append parked items server lacks), and the cold-window park path never represents deletions; STATE media is restored from localStorage so a user can delete while _mediaLoadedTrips is empty, after which the union re-adds the server copy.

verdicts.title: drainOutbox drops a 4xx (401/403) replay silently with no user feedback — offline edits by a since-demoted/kicked member, or after session expiry, vanish without a toast
verdicts.reasoning: Verified inline at outbox.ts:369-380: any 4xx other than 409 is removed from the queue with only console.warn and no user-facing toast or pull.

verdicts.title: Service worker calls skipWaiting() on every install — the 'Update available, reload?' prompt is dead code and tabs auto-reload mid-edit
verdicts.reasoning: Plausible and the cited mechanism (skipWaiting + clients.claim defeating a registration.waiting-gated prompt) is a known pattern, but I did not re-read the main.ts update-prompt gating to fully confirm.

verdicts.title: Outbox is never drained on the 15s poll or on tab re-focus — a mutation that fails while ONLINE (e.g. a 20s timeout) stays stuck until the next offline→online transition or a full reload
verdicts.reasoning: Matches the architecture: drainOutbox is wired only to the 'online' event + a one-shot boot timer; the recurring poll and visibility handlers call sync/notifications but not drain, while apiFetch enqueues on any failure including the online 20s timeout.

verdicts.title: No pending-changes indicator exists — offline queued writes (and their silent dedup loss) are completely invisible to the user
verdicts.reasoning: pendingCount/listPending have no consumer in pages/components; offline failures surface only as a misleading red 'Save failed' toast, so queued work and its dedup loss are invisible.
